diffCoverage.notes: Verified the forward-only layer order and dependency confinement for the new store layer and its command-layer orchestration.

findings.evidence: The contract smoke gate (cred_store_roundtrip: real keychain + AES-GCM roundtrip, ciphertext-on-disk assertion, relaunch auto-restore) is #[ignore] and has not been run. feature_list shows secure-cred-store passes:false / smoke done:false.
findings.fix: Run the ignored live smoke and verify relaunch auto-restore on the GUI before flipping passes:true; record in the evidence bundle.

findings.evidence: store/ imports only crate::types (+ its own crypto submodule); rusqlite/keyring/aes-gcm appear only under src-tauri/src/store/ and zca-rust only under src-tauri/src/zalo/. config/store pre-exist in ADR-0003; native deps authorized by ADR-0005. The command->zalo->store->config->types DAG is acyclic and forward-only.
findings.fix: No action; lift the in-command session store into session/ when session-manager lands (already tracked).

summary: Architecture review of the new store layer + persistence wiring. Forward-only layering holds: store/ has no backward dependency on zalo/command; rusqlite/keyring/aes-gcm stay confined to store/ and zca-rust to zalo/; the credential triple and zca-rust types never rise into command or cross IPC. No unauthorized new layer (config + store pre-exist in ADR-0003; native/bundled deps authorized by ADR-0005). Changed files stay within the union of the features' allowedLayers {types,config,store,zalo,command} plus lib.rs wiring and the src/ UI (which reaches the core only via Tauri invoke/listen). architecture-fitness --strict passes. Decision is needs-human, not pass, because the contract's live smoke proof is #[ignore] and unrun. No blocking findings.
